title: Resonant Frequency Sweep
summary: Sample planning record used to test research-log navigation while outlining a controlled frequency sweep of a coupled resonant circuit.
objective: Define a repeatable sweep procedure for locating resonant response and documenting bandwidth under fixed geometry and loading.
apparatus: Signal generator, oscilloscope, coupled coils, capacitor set, non-inductive load, insulated fixture, and frequency sweep table.
observations: No experimental result is claimed in this test record. It demonstrates how a future planning-stage entry appears in the public log.
next: Replace this sample with measured sweep data when the apparatus and calibration procedure are complete.

measurements.label: Recorded response
measurements.value: Primary current, secondary voltage, phase, temperature
